author: user1
title: Is the Yeti Rambler worth it?
text: I've had mine for 3 years and it's indestructible. Keeps ice for two days.

author: user2
title: Yeti alternatives?
text: I lost my Yeti and don't want to pay $40 again. RTIC seems like a good alternative but the lid leaks.

author: user3
title: Rambler review
upvotes: but the magnetic slider broke within a month. Disappointing for the price tag.
